title: After the Arima Kinen: Toward the Next Breathtaking View

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hah… haaah…!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's Buena Vista! A long-awaited achievement
for a Classic-class Tiara horsegirl! She has
won the Arima Kinen!!
(Woaaaah…!!)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
"Congratulations, Buena Vista!"
"Great job, everyone!!"
"That was the best race ever!!"

The cheers pouring down are filled with
warmth. They celebrate the winner, of
course… but they also honor every horsegirl
who made this year so memorable.
choice_data_list: (So this is the Grand Prix's atmosphere…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hah… ngh…
choice_data_list: (Buena…?)

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"Congratulations, Buena…!"
"That run was incredible～!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"Buenaa Vistaaaa!!"
"You're the heroine of the next generation!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Thank you so much! I…
choice_data_list: Buena! Come back here!
Buena! Come back here!

text_block_list.text:
The exhaustion on Buena Vista's face is
obvious. The moment I call out to her, she
turns and makes her way back, swaying
slightly.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Sorry… maybe I pushed myself a little too
hard…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen really is amazing…!
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Any injuries?
Are you okay? Any injuries?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm fine… completely! Hey, Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I managed to live up to everyone's
expectations… didn't I?
choice_data_list: You did. Congratulations… really!
You did. Congratulations… really!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe…
choice_data_list: Come on, Buena…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: …Buena.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah… Journey…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Allow me. You should head back to the
waiting room first, yes, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Phew… thank you very much. I'm okay now.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for showing you such an embarrassing
side of me…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. After a performance like that, it's
only natural.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: Allow me to congratulate you once again.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Today's race serves as the conclusion of one
year… yet at the same time, it foretells the
next.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
In other words… I've become quite certain
that next year's leading star… will be you.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
And yet, the racing world changes in the blink
of an eye. Just as you appeared…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
…New storms are always on the horizon.
Before one sweeps you away… I do hope you
reach that breathtaking view.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Journey…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You're encouraging me, aren't you? Thank
you! But…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Even if I get swept away by a storm, I'll be
fine! Because I…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …have someone who'll pull me back up.
choice_data_list: (Buena…)

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
…Then perhaps my encouragement was
unnecessary. Still, since we're already here,
one more thing…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: Watch your footing in the mud. …Take care.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
"Watch your footing in the mud" …Do you
think she meant racing?
choice_data_list: I don't know. But… let's remember it.
I don't know. But… let's remember it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Knowing Journey, I'm sure she meant it
for a reason.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Phew… So this is the end of our Classic year.
choice_data_list: We'll need to set the next year's goals too.
We'll need to set the next year's goals too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Right! Our biggest goal is the Japan Cup, of
course…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But before we get there, I want to keep living
up to everyone's expectations. Receiving all
those feelings… That's part of what it takes to
reach that breathtaking view.
choice_data_list: Then perhaps the Victoria Mile comes first.

text_block_list.text:
The Victoria Mile attracts many former Tiara
contenders in the senior-class. It's where the
strongest miler from the Tiara route is decided.
choice_data_list: Everyone's going to want to see their queen.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I see. Then I'll have to show them something
worthy of that title! …Do you think Desire will
be there too?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If Desire's runing too… I'm sure everyone will
be even more excited.
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'd like to see you two clash again.
Yeah. I'd like to see you two clash again.

text_block_list.name: Race Staff A
text_block_list.text: …Buena Vista, we're ready for the interview.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah! Just one more moment, please!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer! My hair… does it look okay?
choice_data_list: Maybe it's sticking up a little?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eh!? Can I fix it in time…?
choice_data_list: Well, it looks cute on you, so it's fine.
Well, it looks cute on you, so it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…You shouldn't just say things like that so
casually, you know…

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
—Buena Vista!
—What are your goals for next year?
—A message for your fans, please!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your questions, everyone. I'll
answer them one at a time!
choice_data_list: (Looks like she'll be even more popular…)

text_block_list.text:
Having successfully completed the Arima
Kinen, Buena Vista's name spreads even
further thanks to the race's immense
popularity.
…Far more than either of us expected.

text_block_list.name: Person A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you watch the Arima Kinen the other
day!? There was this super cute girl…

text_block_list.name: Person B
text_block_list.text: Oh, I did! You mean Buena Vista, right?

text_block_list.name: Person B
text_block_list.text: She totally blew up on UmaTok. Everyone was saying they cried because of how hard she was trying when she ran!

text_block_list.name: Person A
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! That made me go watch a bunch of
her older races too… She's seriously adorable.

text_block_list.name: Person A
text_block_list.text:
And she's ridiculously strong! I think I might
be a fan now～!

text_block_list.name: Person B
text_block_list.text:
Right!? Let's go cheer for her sometime!
I can't wait to see what Buena does next year～!
